description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical can with a matte silver finish, featuring the iconic Monster Energy 'M' claw logo in a metallic gray on the front. The can is labeled 'Monster Energy Ultra' and displays additional branding and product information in black and blue text. Around the top rim, the phrases 'Zero Sugar' and 'Zero Calorie' are prominently printed. One side of the can displays a detailed supplement facts panel, listing nutritional information and ingredients. The can has a standard pull-tab opening on the top, typical of beverage cans. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a focus on energy and zero-calorie messaging.
description: A tall, silver can with the Monster Energy 'M' logo, zero sugar and calorie branding, and a detailed supplement facts panel. The design is sleek and modern with black and blue accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large Monster Energy 'M' logo and product name 'Monster Energy Ultra' in black and blue.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the 'Zero Sugar' and 'Zero Calorie' text around the rim, with part of the supplement facts panel visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full supplement facts panel and nutritional information in black text.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the transition between the supplement facts panel and the front logo, with rim text visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The Monster Energy 'M' claw logo is prominently displayed on the front, in metallic gray, with the word 'Monster' below it in black and blue.
attribute_flavor_indication: The can is labeled 'Ultra', but no explicit flavor is indicated.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A supplement facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories, carbohydrates, vitamins, and other nutritional information.
